heading: Procedures for monitoring careers of joint qualified officers
label: 665 Procedures for monitoring careers of joint qualified officers
notes: Amendments2008— in section catchline substituted “joint qualified officers” for “joint officers” and in subsecs. (a)(1)(A) and (b)(1) substituted “designated as a joint qualified officer” for “with the joint specialty”.Pub. L. 110–417

Transition to Joint Officer Personnel PolicyProcedures under subsec. (a) of this section to be established not later than the end of the eight-month period beginning , and provisions of subsec. (b) of this section to be implemented not later than the end of such period, see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1986section 406(c) of Pub. L. 99–433section 661 of this title
amendments: Amendments2008— in section catchline substituted “joint qualified officers” for “joint officers” and in subsecs. (a)(1)(A) and (b)(1) substituted “designated as a joint qualified officer” for “with the joint specialty”.Pub. L. 110–417

children.label: A
children.text: officers designated as a joint qualified officer; and

children.label: B
children.text: other officers who serve in joint duty assignments.
Such oversight shall include monitoring of the implementation of the career guidelines established under .section 661(e) of this title
monitor the promotions and career assignments of officers designated as a joint qualified officer and of other officers who have served in joint duty assignments; and
otherwise advise the Chairman on joint personnel matters.
